description_long: This object is a shotgun with a classic design, featuring a wooden full stock and fore-end, and a long, cylindrical metal barrel. The receiver and barrel are finished in a dark metallic color, contrasting with the warm brown of the wood components. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a visible trigger, with a simple, utilitarian design. The shotgun appears to have a single barrel with no visible ribbing or venting along the top. The action mechanism is not overtly detailed, but there is no visible pump or lever, suggesting a straightforward break-action or single-shot configuration. The overall form is compact and robust, suitable for use in urban environments such as garages or security settings.
description: A compact shotgun with a wooden full stock and a long, dark metal barrel, featuring a rounded trigger guard and a simple, classic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, long metal barrel, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the stock and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the trigger and guard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the wooden stock and the end of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, simple with no finger grooves or reinforcement
